name: SY6970 Battery Management IC
description: The `sy6970` component allows you to use the SY6970 battery management and charging ICs [SY6970 Datasheet](https://github.com/Xinyuan-LilyGO/LilyGo-AMOLED-Series/blob/master/datasheet/SY6970%20Datasheet.pdf) with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the device. Defaults to `0x6A`.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to check the sensor. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Charge Current
config_entries.description: Charge current in milliamps. Accepts values between 0 and 5056. Defaults to 2048.

config_entries.label: Charge Enabled
config_entries.description: Enable or disable charging. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Charge Voltage
config_entries.description: Charge voltage in millivolts. Accepts values between 3840 and 4608. Defaults to `4208`.

config_entries.label: Enable ADC
config_entries.description: Enable or disable the ADC. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Enable Status LED
config_entries.description: Enable or disable the status LED on the IC. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Input Current Limit
config_entries.description: Input current in milliamps. Accepts values between 100 and 3200. Defaults to `500`.

config_entries.label: Precharge Current
config_entries.description: Pre-charge current in milliamps. Accepts values between 64 and 1024. Defaults to 128.
